title: McAfee ePO Repository Compliance Playbook v2
content:
Ensures that ePO servers are updated to the latest McAfee published AV signatures (DAT file version).

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Cortex XSOAR pack (epo, xsoar-supported).

Integrations/scripts used: AreValuesEqual, Sleep, epo-get-current-dat, epo-get-latest-dat, epo-update-repository, send-mail.

name: McAfee ePO Repository Compliance Playbook v2
description: Ensures that ePO servers are updated to the latest McAfee published AV
